mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_usage_log ( log_id, memberno, item_type, used_at ) VALUES ( item_usage_log_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberno}, #{item_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT memberno, item_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt --, used_at, created_at FROM item_usage_log WHERE memberno = #{memberno} AND TRUNC(used_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) GROUP BY memberno, item_type
SELECT memberno, item_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM item_usage_log WHERE memberno = #{memberno} AND TRUNC(used_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) GROUP BY memberno, item_type
